title: Better Recipe Book (Extended)
description: This is an unofficial fork of Better Recipe Book, intended for migration to higher versions and feature expansion, without changing the core functionality.
body:
<details>
<summary>中文页面</summary>

这是[更好的配方书](https://modrinth.com/mod/brb)的非官方分支，旨在高版本迁移或拓展功能。  

- 更好的配方书模组改进了原版的配方书（与JEI的理念相似），使其更加方便易用。
- 就算你不喜欢配方书也可以安装此模组，因为它提供了禁用配方书入口的功能。
- 访问他们的页面了解核心功能。

### 拓展功能

1. 在生存模式物品栏显示所有已解锁配方。（可配置）
2. 可合成的配方会固定在配方书的最前面，不需要额外控制了。
3. 显示来源模组名。（可配置）
   - 可通过资源包翻译模组名，键名为 `"jade.modName.<namespace>"`
4. 配方书内的物品能够通过 REI/JEI 查看配方以及用途。
5. 可以通过配置界面隐藏 REI/JEI 的界面（不影响查询合成/用途功能）。（可配置）
   - 对喜欢清爽界面但又需要某些工具的玩家很合适。
6. 完整复刻REI的高级搜索功能。
7. 还有许多功能的Wiki尚未整理。

### 如何正确安装？

 - 仅需要客户端部署即可实现全部功能。
 - 需要与 Cloth Config API 同时部署。(26.2以前的版本需要再部署 Architectury API）

### 受支持的 Minecraft 版本及模组加载器

| | Fabric | NeoForge |
|---|---|---|
| 26.2 | ✅ | ✅ |
| 26.1.2 | ✅ | ✅ |
| 1.21.11 | ✅ | ✅ |
| 1.21.1 | ✅ | ✅ |

### 支持的语言

| 语言 |
|---|
| en_us |
| zh_cn |
| zh_tw |
| ja_jp |
| ru_ru |
| pl_pl |
| tr_tr |
---
如果有关于本项目的建议（虽然不一定会实现）和Bug，欢迎前往[GitHub](https://github.com/Avalonia-0/Better-Recipe-Book-Extended-)提交Issue。
</details>


<details>
<summary>English page</summary>

This is an unofficial fork of [Better Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/brb), aimed at porting to newer Minecraft versions and extending functionality.

- Better Recipe Book improves the vanilla recipe book (similar in concept to JEI), making it more convenient and user-friendly. 
- Even if you don't like the recipe book, you can still install this mod because it provides a feature to disable the recipe book entry.
- Visit their page to learn about the core features.

### Extended Features

1. **Show all unlocked recipes in survival inventory.** (configurable)
2. **Craftable recipes are always pinned to the front of the recipe book** — no extra controls needed.
3. **Display source mod name.** (configurable) 
   - Mod names can be translated via resource packs using the key `"jade.modName.<namespace>"`.
4. **REI/JEI integration** — items inside the recipe book can be viewed in REI/JEI for recipes and usages.
5. **Hide REI/JEI overlay via config** — does not affect recipe/usage lookup functionality. (configurable)
   - Ideal for players who prefer a clean UI but still need certain tools. 
6. Fully replicate REI's advanced search functionality.

### How to Install?

- **Client-side only** — all features work with a client-side installation only. No server-side mod required.
- **Dependencies** — requires Cloth Config API to be installed alongside it. (For versions prior to 26.2, Architectury API is also required.)

### Supported Minecraft Versions and Mod Loaders

| | Fabric | NeoForge |
|---|---|---|
| 26.2 | ✅ | ✅ |
| 26.1.2 | ✅ | ✅ |
| 1.21.11 | ✅ | ✅ |
| 1.21.1 | ✅ | ✅ |

### Supported Languages

| Language |
|---|
| en_us |
| zh_cn |
| zh_tw |
| ja_jp |
| ru_ru |
| pl_pl |
| tr_tr |
---
If you have any suggestions (though not necessarily implemented) or bugs regarding this project, feel free to submit an Issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/Avalonia-0/Better-Recipe-Book-Extended-).
</details>
